title: Command Center — FD Mission Control run detail
summary: This feature delivery ships FD Mission Control at /mission-control as a single-run inspection surface inside the Command Center shell. The module polls GET /api/run-state every 7500 ms, honors ?task= deep links, and stacks a run context header, retry-limit banner, nine-stage rail with mission-control chrome, stage…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: Three embedded llm-judge UX contract blocks in ux-spec.md; no contracts.index.json sidecar.

intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-09T11:05:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; staged diff covers operator-readability re-entry delta in eight touch-set paths atop base Mission Control at commit d614324.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
